basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released the official Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 Senior Research Fellow vacancy has been announced under the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 50 years of age with an M.Tech./ M.S./ M.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering or an equivalent qualification, a valid CSIR-UGC NET/ GATE score, and a minimum of two years of research experience after the qualifying degree can apply online on or before 18 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./ M.S/ M.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering or equivalent with minimum 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA, National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship or GATE, Minimum two years of research experience after qualifying degree
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: M.Tech./ M.S/ M.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering or equivalent degree in a closely related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA (on a 10-point scale). National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE. Minimum two years of research experience after obtaining the qualifying degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Research Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 18th July 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M.S/M.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering or an equivalent degree with at least 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA. Additionally, qualifying in CSIR-UGC NET or GATE is mandatory, along with two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow position is 50 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 54,600 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Gandhinagar Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Application Review. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience before further steps, if any.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Gandhinagar or the direct application link provided. Ensure all required documents are uploaded and the form is submitted before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Research Fellow at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any relaxation in the age limit?
faq.answer: While the maximum age limit is 50 years, specific age relaxation details for reserved categories are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
